title: Decadent Spanish Oats Gazpacho
description: A creamy and cheesy gazpacho featuring oats and sashimi-cut vegetables, perfect for a kid-friendly lunch or snack. This dish is ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly and packed with flavor.
instructions: In a large pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the diced red onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the sashimi-cut red bell pepper and cucumber, cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the paprika and cook for 1 minute.
In a blender or food processor, puree the cooked vegetables, oats, and canned diced tomatoes until smooth.
Return the mixture to the pot and stir in the shredded cheddar cheese until melted and well combined.
Stir in the sour cream and season with salt to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional sashimi-cut vegetables and a dollop of sour cream if desired.
Let the gazpacho cool to room temperature before refrigerating or freezing for later use.
